subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #006 Christ
subcodes.first_line: Afterwards Christ appeared, saying, “I am born of the Holy Spirit.” If it is easy today
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد حضرت مسیح آمد و گفت که من بروح القدس تولد یافتم اگر چه حال
